div.h1: DLQ Message Flow: From Poison Detection to Dead Letter Topic

ul.li: Original topic & offset — trace back to source
Original payload — base64 encoded in JSON
Retry count — how many delivery attempts
Failure reason — last NACK reason string
Failed at — timestamp of poison classification

div.p: DLQ is NOT a trash can — it's a debugging tool. Every failed message tells a story that helps:
